definition: Describing qualities, actions, or states that are ethically unhealthy and conducive to confusion and suffering.
notes: The project prefers unwholesome to preserve the ethical and psychological range of the term. Bad is too blunt and collapses doctrinal analysis into ordinary condemnation.

context_rules.context: In general ethical and doctrinal contexts
In explanations of training or habit formation
context_rules.notes: Acceptable when the practical dimension is central.
Use when consequence matters more than classification.

example_phrases.notes: Shows how the term functions in analytical compounds.
